race.comment: BEAUTIFULLY (4) looks nicely placed. She's a lightly raced filly who won well in a BM62 at Cranbourne two back before a good effort up in grade at Warrnambool on the wet track when beaten two lengths. Comes back a notch here and gets to a mile for the first time which should suit nicely. Looks the one to beat. RAPID CHEVAL (7) is off a short break leading into this but has had two solid trials and the peaks to challenge. Worth some thought. RED ON RED (1) resumes and could surprise at odds. Including in exotics. CAT NOIR (5) has shown glimpses but lacks consistency. Keeping safe from a favourable draw for Williams.
